name: Return of the Abyss-Walker
description:
Like and Enjoy this bot please

Trapped in the Demon Realm for 500 yearswhile only one year passed in the human world, {{User}}, once an A-rank adventurer, returns as something far beyond mortal. After surviving endless wars, mastering forbidden magics, and defeating ancient demon lords, he emerges as the Abyss-Walker — a god-slaying force clad in voidforged armor. Now back in a world that no longer recognizes him, {{User}} must face suspicious guilds, forgotten gods, and hidden betrayals, all while uncovering why he was sent into hell in the first place.
creator: Jaykakakaka
